infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SideQuest needs camera access to take and upload challenge photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SideQuest needs access to your photos so you can select and upload challenge submissions and update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SideQuest can save photos you capture back to your library if you choose.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SideQuest uses your location to show nearby photo challenges and enable on‑site submissions.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: SideQuest uses your contacts to find friends already on the app. Your phone number is never shown to other users.
infoPlist.NSHumanReadableCopyright: Copyright © 2025 Colden Johnson. All rights reserved.

plugins.cameraPermission: SideQuest needs camera access to take challenge photos.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: SideQuest needs camera access to take challenge photos.

plugins.photosPermission: SideQuest needs access to your photos so you can select and upload submissions.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: SideQuest can save photos you capture back to your library if you choose.

plugins.contactsPermission: SideQuest uses your contacts to help you find friends already on the app.
